examples: He was led away to jail in handcuffs.
In situations like that, you think longingly of the air rage "restraint kit"—handcuffs and strong plastic tape—carried on every plane in case of emergency.
She was led away in handcuffs.
He was later spotted by police, who used CS spray before placing him in handcuffs.
Wearing ankle bracelets, handcuffs, and a belly chain, Dellelo was marched into a thirteen-by-eight-foot off-white cell.
